title: TC001 Community homepage shows Qorx 1.0.4a
description: Verify the public Qorx Community Edition home page loads, names the edition guide, and shows version 1.0.4a.

title: TC002 Community docs expose edition and TestSprite QA links
description: Verify the public Qorx home page links to the Community Edition guide and TestSprite QA docs.

title: TC003 Technical credibility page bounds language and bytecode claims
description: Verify the public Qorx docs include a credibility page that bounds language, bytecode, qstk, Forth, and provider-savings claims.
